help.agent.adaptive_system_prompt_token_: Justerer tokenbudsjettet automatisk etter modellens kontekstvindu. Anbefales med tokenbudsjett = 0.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.always_include: Beskrivelse: Tool names always offered regardless of adaptive selection.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.clean_transiti: Fjerner utdatert verktøyovergangsdata etter X dager.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.decay_half_lif: Beskrivelse: Half-life for usage scoring in days. Older usage data loses influence. Higher values = slower forgetting.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.enabled: Lærer fra bruksloggen hvilke verktøy som brukes mest og prioriterer dem. Mindre brukte verktøy tilbys sjeldnere.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.max_tools: Maks antall adaptive/foretrukne verktøy. Påkrevde og alltid inkluderte verktøy kan komme i tillegg.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.weight_success: Foretrekker verktøy med høyere suksessrater i adaptiv utvelgelse.
help.agent.additional_prompt: Beskrivelse: Arbitrary text that is always appended at the end of the system prompt. Ideal for user-specific rules, context info, or fixed instructions that should apply to every request.
help.agent.allow_filesystem_write: Når dette er deaktivert, tillates bare leseoperasjoner (list, read). Skriveoperasjoner (write, delete, move, mkdir…) blokkeres.
help.agent.allow_mcp: Beskrivelse: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows the agenten to connect to external MCP servers (Model Context Protocol) and use their tools. MCP servers are external processes that can execute arbitrary code — only add trusted servers!
help.agent.allow_network_requests: Når dette er deaktivert: the agenten blocks all api_request calls. Other integrations (Telegram, Discord…) are unaffected.
help.agent.allow_python: Når dette er deaktivert: the agenten blocks execute_python, execute_skill and save_tool.
help.agent.allow_remote_shell: Når dette er deaktivert: execute_remote_shell / remote_execution are blocked.
help.agent.allow_self_update: Når dette er deaktivert: the agenten cannot run manage_updates (no automatic self-updates).
help.agent.allow_shell: Når dette er deaktivert: the agenten blocks all execute_shell requests with a PERMISSION DENIED error.
help.agent.allow_web_scraper: Utdatert — bruk tools.web_scraper.enabled i delen 'Verktøy og tjenester' i stedet.
help.agent.announcement_detector.enabled: Oppdager når LLM kun kunngjør en handling (f.eks. 'La meg sjekke det…') uten å faktisk kalle et verktøy, og prøver automatisk på nytt for å få et ekte svar.
help.agent.announcement_detector.max_ret: Maksimalt antall korrigerende forsøk per brukerrunde når et rent kunngjøringsvarsel oppdages. Agenten ber modellen på nytt om å faktisk utføre handlingen. Standard: 2.
help.agent.background_tasks.enabled: Lar agenten starte asynkrone oppfølgingsoppgaver etter at hovedsvaret er sendt.
help.agent.background_tasks.follow_up_de: Beskrivelse: Wait time after the main response in sekunder before a follow-up task starts.
help.agent.background_tasks.http_timeout: Maksimum: wait time for HTTP requests within background tasks.
help.agent.background_tasks.max_retries: Maksimalt antall automatiske forsøk for mislykkede bakgrunnsoppgaver.
help.agent.background_tasks.retry_delay_: Beskrivelse: Wait time between retry attempts in sekunder.
help.agent.background_tasks.wait_default: Maksimum: wait time for a background task to complete. Standard: 600 sekunder (10 minutter).
help.agent.background_tasks.wait_poll_in: Hvor ofte agenten sjekker statusen til en ventende oppgave (i sekunder).
help.agent.context_window: Beskrivelse: Total context window size in tokens. The agenten uses this to calculate available capacity. 0 = auto-detect from model.
help.agent.core_memory_cap_mode: Gedrag wanneer de limiet is bereikt: "soft" voegt de invoer toe en retourneert een waarschuwing, "hard" weigert nieuwe invoer. Standaard: soft.
help.agent.debug_mode: Aktiverer debug mode with extended error messages.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.enabled: Aktiverer Emotion Synthesizer. Genererer naturlige språkbeskrivelser av agentens emosjonelle tilstand basert på humør, samtalecontekst og personlighetstrekk. Krever Personality Engine V2.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.max_histo: Maksimalt antall emosjonshistorikkoppføringer. Eldre oppføringer ryddes under vedlikehold. Standard: 100.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.min_inter: Minimumsintervall i sekunder mellom emosjonssyntese-kall. Forhindrer overdreven LLM-bruk. Standard: 60.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.trigger_o: Utløs emosjonssyntese når humøret endres (oppdaget av V2-analyse). Standard: av.
help.agent.max_tool_guides: Maksimum: number of tool manuals embedded in the system prompt. Fewer = shorter prompt but less tool knowledge.
help.agent.memory_compression_char_limit: Beskrivelse: Messages exceeding this character limit are automatically summarized to save tokens in the context window.
help.agent.optimizer_enabled: Beskrivelse: Automatically shortens the system prompt when the context window runs low. Unused manuals are removed to save space.
help.agent.personality_engine: Schakelt de personality engine in met stemming en micro-traits. Wordt automatisch ingeschakeld wanneer Personality Engine V2 actief is.
help.agent.personality_engine_v2: Schakelt de geavanceerde V2-engine in met asynchrone LLM stemminganalyse. Schakelt automatisch V1 ook in (vereiste afhankelijkheid).
help.agent.personality_v2_api_key: Valgfritt: custom API key for the V2 engine. Usually 'ollama' for Ollama.
help.agent.personality_v2_provider: Beskrivelse: Legacy compatibility field. Helper-owned personality analysis now uses the central Helper LLM from the LLM settings.
help.agent.personality_v2_timeout_secs: Tidsavbrudd i sekunder for det asynkrone V2 LLM-kallet. Standard: 30.
help.agent.personality_v2_url: Valgfritt: custom base URL for V2, e.g. for a local Ollama ('http://localhost:11434/v1').
help.agent.recovery.duplicate_consecutiv: Antall etterfølgende identiske svar oppdaget som en løkke.
help.agent.recovery.duplicate_frequency_: Hvor mange ganger det samme svaret kan forekomme i historikken før en løkke oppdages.
help.agent.recovery.identical_tool_error: Hvor mange ganger den samme verktøyfeilen kan forekomme etter hverandre før agenten avbryter.
help.agent.recovery.max_provider_422_rec: Hvor mange ganger agenten prøver å gjenopprette fra leverandørens '422 Bad Request'-feil før den gir opp.
help.agent.recovery.min_messages_for_emp: Minimum antall meldinger i historikken før agenten prøver igjen ved tomme svar.
help.agent.show_tool_results: Beskrivelse: Shows tool results in the chat window as collapsible debug blocks.
help.agent.step_delay_seconds: Beskrivelse: Delay between tool calls in sekunder. 0 = no delay.
help.agent.sudo_enabled: Aktiverer execute_sudo. The sudo password must be stored in the vault under the key 'sudo_password'.
help.agent.sudo_unrestricted: Tillater agenten å skrive utenfor installasjonsmappen ved hjelp av sudo (f.eks. /etc/). Krever fjerning av ProtectSystem=strict fra systemd-tjenesteenheten. Uten dette alternativet er sudo-skriving begrenset til kun installasjonsmappen.
help.agent.system_language: Beskrivelse: Language for responses, e.g. 'Deutsch' or 'English'.
help.agent.system_prompt_token_budget: Maksimum: token count for the system prompt. The optimizer trims to this limit. 0 = auto-calculate.
help.agent.tool_output_limit: Beskrivelse: Tool responses exceeding this character limit are truncated. Prevents token waste from overly long outputs.
help.agent.user_profiling: Schakelt automatisch gebruikersprofiel in: de agent detecteert voorkeuren en gewoonten uit de chat en slaat ze op (vereist Personality Engine V2).
help.agent.user_profiling_threshold: Minimum: confidence (number of confirmations) before a profile attribute is injected into the system prompt. Standard: 2.
help.agent.workflow_feedback: Schakelt occasionele statusupdates in tijdens lange workflows (bijv. "Een ogenblik geduld...").
help.ai_gateway.account_id: Ditt Cloudflare Account ID. Finnes i Cloudflare-dashbordet under Workers & Pages.
help.ai_gateway.enabled: Aktiver Cloudflare AI Gateway to proxy all LLM API requests. Provides caching, rate-limiting, logging, and analytics. Local providers (Ollama) are excluded.
help.ai_gateway.gateway_id: Navnet eller slug for din AI Gateway-instans i Cloudflare.
help.ai_gateway.token: Valgfritt: Cloudflare AI Gateway token for authenticated gateways. Stored securely in the encrypted vault and sent as the cf-aig-authorization header.
help.ansible.container_name: Beskrivelse: (Sidecar mode only) Docker container name for the auto-managed Ansible sidecar. Standard: 'aurago_ansible'.
help.ansible.default_inventory: Beskrivelse: (Local mode only) Standard inventory file (e.g. '/etc/ansible/hosts'). Env var: ANSIBLE_INVENTORY.
help.ansible.enabled: Aktiverer the Ansible integration. Supports two modes: 'sidecar' (Docker API) and 'local' (ansible CLI directly on the host).
help.ansible.image: Beskrivelse: (Sidecar mode only) Docker image for the Ansible sidecar container. Standard: 'aurago-ansible:latest'. Build with: docker build -f Dockerfile.ansible -t aurago-ansible .
help.ansible.mode: Beskrivelse: Execution mode: 'sidecar' = Ansible API container (Docker), 'local' = call ansible binaries directly on the host. Standard: 'sidecar'.
help.ansible.playbooks_dir: Beskrivelse: (Local mode only) Directory containing Ansible playbooks (e.g. '/opt/ansible/playbooks'). Env var: ANSIBLE_PLAYBOOKS_DIR.
help.ansible.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only check status, inventory, and list playbooks but cannot run ad-hoc commands or playbooks.
help.ansible.timeout: Maksimum: runtime for Ansible commands in sekunder (default: 300). Increase for long-running playbooks.
help.ansible.token: Beskrivelse: (Sidecar mode only) Bearer token for the Ansible sidecar API. Must match ANSIBLE_API_TOKEN in the container.
help.ansible.url: Beskrivelse: (Sidecar mode only) URL of the Ansible API server. Standard: 'http://ansible:5001'.
help.brave_search.api_key: Beskrivelse: Brave Search subscription token (X-Subscription-Token). Get a free or paid key at https://brave.com/search/api/ — the free tier allows 2000 requests/month.
help.brave_search.country: Standard: country code for localised results, e.g. 'DE' or 'US'. La stå tomt for global search.
help.brave_search.enabled: Aktiver the Brave Search integration. Allows web searches via the Brave Search API with high-quality, up-to-date results.
help.brave_search.lang: Standard søkespråk som kortkode, f.eks. 'de' eller 'en'. AuraGo mapper dette automatisk til en Brave-kompatibel UI-lokale som 'de-DE'. Agenten kan overstyre dette per forespørsel.
help.budget.daily_limit_usd: Beskrivelse: Daily spending limit in USD.
help.budget.default_cost.input_per_milli: Standard: cost for 1 million input tokens if model is not listed.
help.budget.default_cost.output_per_mill: Standard: cost for 1 million output tokens if model is not listed.
help.budget.enforcement: Handling ved budsjettoverskridelse: 'warn' = bare advarsel, 'partial' = begrensede verktøy, 'full' = stopp.
help.budget.reset_hour: Beskrivelse: Hour of the day (0-23) when the daily budget resets.
help.budget.warning_threshold: Beskrivelse: Percentage (0.0 to 1.0) at which a warning is triggered.
help.chromecast.enabled: Aktiverer Chromecast integration for audio output.
help.chromecast.tts_port: Lokal port for TTS-filserveren for strømming til Chromecast.
help.circuit_breaker.llm_timeout_seconds: Maksimum: wait time for an LLM response in sekunder. Request is aborted if exceeded.
help.circuit_breaker.maintenance_timeout: Maksimum: duration for maintenance tasks in minutter. Also: time without user activity before the agenten automatically returns from maintenance mode.
help.circuit_breaker.max_tool_calls: Beskrivelse: Aborts the task if more tool calls than this value occur. Prevents infinite loops and uncontrolled token consumption.
help.circuit_breaker.retry_intervals: Beskrivelse: Wait times between automatic retry attempts, comma-separated (e.g. '30s,2m,10m'). Controls backoff behavior on errors.
help.co_agents.llm.provider: Velg a provider from the provider management for Co-Agents. Empty = main LLM.
help.co_agents.max_concurrent: Maksimum: number of concurrently running Co-Agents.
help.discord.allowed_user_id: Beskrivelse: The only User ID the Discord bot will listen to.
help.discord.bot_token: Beskrivelse: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal.
help.discord.default_channel_id: Beskrivelse: The ID of the default channel for startup messages.
help.discord.guild_id: Beskrivelse: ID of the Discord server (Guild).
help.discord.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only read Discord messages but cannot send them.
help.docker.host: Valgfritt: remote Docker host (e.g. tcp://192.168.1.5:2375). La stå tomt for local socket.
help.docker.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only list and inspect Docker containers but cannot start, stop, create, or remove them.
help.egg_mode.egg_id: Beskrivelse: Unique egg ID (assigned by master). Env: AURAGO_EGG_ID.
help.egg_mode.enabled: Aktiverer egg mode: This instance is a worker egg controlled by a master. Env: AURAGO_EGG_MODE.
help.egg_mode.master_url: Beskrivelse: WebSocket URL of the master (e.g. ws://master:8080/api/invasion/ws). Env: AURAGO_MASTER_URL.
help.egg_mode.nest_id: Beskrivelse: Nest ID where this egg is deployed. Env: AURAGO_NEST_ID.
help.egg_mode.shared_key: Beskrivelse: Shared HMAC key for master authentication. Env: AURAGO_SHARED_KEY.
help.email.from_address: Beskrivelse: Sender email address to be transmitted.
help.email.imap_port: Beskrivelse: IMAP server port (usually 993 for SSL).
help.email.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only read emails but cannot send them.
help.email.watch_enabled: Beskrivelse: Watches the email inbox for new messages.
help.email.watch_folder: Beskrivelse: The mailbox folder to check for new mails (usually INBOX).
help.email.watch_interval_seconds: Intervall i sekunder to check the mailbox.
help.email_accounts.from_address: Beskrivelse: Sender email address. Empty = same as username.
help.email_accounts.id: Beskrivelse: Unique identifier of the email account (e.g. personal, work).
help.email_accounts.imap_port: Beskrivelse: IMAP server port (usually 993 for SSL).
help.email_accounts.name: Visningsnavn for e-postkontoen.
help.email_accounts.smtp_port: Beskrivelse: SMTP server port (587 = STARTTLS, 465 = SSL/TLS).
help.email_accounts.watch_enabled: Aktiverer the inbox watcher for this account.
help.email_accounts.watch_folder: Beskrivelse: The mailbox folder to check for new mails (usually INBOX).
help.email_accounts.watch_interval_secon: Intervall i sekunder to check this account's mailbox.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.container_p: Beskrivelse: Host port for the managed Ollama container (default: 11435). Must be free and different from other Ollama instances.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.enabled: Beskrivelse: Automatically starts a local Ollama container for embeddings. Ideal for fully local setups without external APIs.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.gpu_backend: GPU-backend for Ollama-containeren. 'auto' registrerer automatisk NVIDIA, AMD, Intel eller Vulkan. Angi manuelt hvis automatisk gjenkjenning mislykkes. Bruk 'vulkan' for eldre iGPUer/APUer uten ROCm-støtte.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.model: Embedding-modell for Ollama (standard: 'nomic-embed-text'). Modellen lastes automatisk ned ved første oppstart.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.use_host_gp: Sender vertens GPU-enheter til containeren (kun Linux). Aktiver for GPU-akselererte embeddings.
help.embeddings.multimodal: Aktiverer multimodale embeddings. Når aktiv, bygges bilder og lydfiler direkte inn som vektorer. Aktiver bare hvis embedding-modellen støtter multimodal inndata (f.eks. Voyage AI, Google multimodal-embedding). Skannede PDF-er med lite utvinnbar tekst behandles automatisk som bilder.
help.embeddings.multimodal_format: Beskrivelse: API format for multimodal embedding requests. 'auto' detects the format based on the provider type. 'openai' uses the OpenAI-compatible format, 'vertex' uses the Google Vertex AI format.
help.embeddings.provider: Beskrivelse: Provider from the provider management used for embeddings. Model and URL are taken from the provider entry. 'disabled' turns off long-term memory entirely.
help.fallback_llm.enabled: Aktiverer automatic failover to a backup LLM on errors.
help.fallback_llm.error_threshold: Antall: sequential errors before switching to fallback model.
help.fallback_llm.probe_interval_seconds: Intervall i sekunder to probe and try restoring the primary model.
help.fallback_llm.provider: Beskrivelse: Provider from provider management for the fallback LLM. Model, URL and API key are taken from the provider entry.
help.github.base_url: Beskrivelse: Base URL of the GitHub API. Standard: 'https://api.github.com'. For GitHub Enterprise, enter your own API URL.
help.github.default_private: Når dette er aktivert: new repositories are created as 'private' by default. Otherwise as 'public'.
help.github.enabled: Aktiverer the GitHub integration for repository and issue management.
help.github.owner: Beskrivelse: GitHub username or organization used as the default owner for API calls.
help.github.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only read repos, issues, and PRs but cannot create, delete, or modify files.
help.github.token: Beskrivelse: Personal Access Token (PAT) for the GitHub API. Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens with the required scopes (repo, issues, etc.). Stored encrypted in the vault.
help.home_assistant.access_token: Beskrivelse: Long-lived access token for Home Assistant auth.
help.home_assistant.allowed_services: Valgfri liste over Home Assistant-tjenester agenten kan kalle, f.eks. light.turn_on. La den staa tom for aa tillate alle tjenester med mindre de er blokkert nedenfor.
help.home_assistant.blocked_services: Home Assistant-tjenester agenten aldri kan kalle, f.eks. lock.unlock. Denne blokkeringslisten sjekkes foer tillatte tjenester.
help.home_assistant.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only read device states but cannot call services (no toggling devices).
help.home_assistant.url: URL til Home Assistant instance, e.g. 'http://192.168.1.100:8123'.
help.homepage.allow_container_management: Når aktivert, kan agenten starte, stoppe, gjenoppbygge og ødelegge utviklingscontaineren.
help.homepage.allow_deploy: Når aktivert, kan agenten distribuere nettsteder til en ekstern server via SFTP/SCP.
help.homepage.deploy_host: Vertsnavn eller IP-adresse for den eksterne webserveren for distribusjon.
help.homepage.deploy_path: Absolutt bane på den eksterne serveren der nettstedsfiler lastes opp (f.eks. /var/www/html).
help.homepage.deploy_port: Beskrivelse: SSH port of the remote server. Standard: 22.
help.homepage.enabled: Aktiverer det Docker-baserte webutviklingsverktøyet. Docker-integrasjon må være aktiv.
help.homepage.webserver_domain: Valgfritt: domain for automatic HTTPS via Let's Encrypt.
help.homepage.webserver_enabled: Beskrivelse: Starts a local Caddy web server in Docker to preview websites. Supports automatic HTTPS with a domain.
help.homepage.webserver_internal_only: Når aktivert, binder Caddy-containeren kun til 127.0.0.1 (localhost). Webserveren er da bare tilgjengelig lokalt, ikke fra eksterne nettverk.
help.homepage.webserver_port: Beskrivelse: Port for the local Caddy web server. Standard: 8080.
help.homepage.workspace_path: Lokal katalog for webprosjekter, montert i Docker-containeren.
help.indexing.directories: Beskrivelse: List of directories to watch and index. Relative paths are resolved from the config directory. Standard: ./knowledge.
help.indexing.enabled: Aktiverer automatic file indexing. Files in configured folders are periodically scanned, converted to embeddings, and available to the agenten as a knowledge base.
help.indexing.extensions: Beskrivelse: List of file extensions to index. Text files are read directly, documents (.pdf, .docx, .xlsx, .pptx, .odt, .rtf) are automatically extracted. Binary files (executables) are automatically rejected. Standard: .txt, .md, .json, .csv, .log, .yaml, .yml, .pdf, .docx, .xlsx, .pptx, .odt, .rtf.
help.indexing.index_images: Når dette er aktivert: image files (.jpg, .png, .gif, .webp, .bmp) are sent to the Vision LLM for analysis. The result is stored with filename and path in the embeddings. Warning: Can cause significant API costs with many images.
help.indexing.poll_interval_seconds: Beskrivelse: How often (in sekunder) directories are checked for changes. Standard: 60.
help.invasion_control.enabled: Aktiverer the Invasion Control UI for managing sub-agentens (Eggs) and deployment targets (Nests).
help.invasion_control.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only list nests and eggs but cannot assign, hatch, stop, or send tasks/secrets.
help.koofr.app_password: Beskrivelse: App password for the Koofr API.
help.koofr.base_url: Beskrivelse: Base URL of the Koofr server (usually https://app.koofr.net).
help.koofr.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only read and list files but cannot write, delete, or move them.
help.koofr.username: Beskrivelse: Email address for the Koofr login.
help.llm.helper_enabled: Aktiverer den dedikerte Helper LLM for intern analyse og bakgrunnsoppgaver. Hvis deaktivert, vil mange avhengige hjelpefunksjoner ikke fungere fullt ut.
help.llm.helper_model: Valgfri modelloverstyring for Helper LLM. En mindre, raskere og billigere modell anbefales vanligvis her.
help.llm.helper_provider: Leverandør fra leverandørstyring for Helper LLM. Denne modellen brukes til interne hjelpeoppgaver og er atskilt fra Guardian-modellen.
help.llm.multimodal: Når aktivert, konverterer AuraGo vedlagte bilder i chat til multimodale `image_url`-deler for hoved-LLM-forespørselen. Krever en visjonær modell/leverandør. Advarsel: bilder kan betydelig øke kontekst/token-bruk og kostnader.
help.llm.multimodal_provider_types_extra: Valgfri liste over ekstra leverandørtyper som skal behandles som multimodal-kompatible for bilder (f.eks. legg til "ollama" hvis Ollama-endepunktet ditt støtter image parts).
help.llm.provider: Beskrivelse: Provider from provider management for the main LLM. Model, URL and API key are taken from the provider entry.
help.llm.structured_outputs: Beskrivelse: ⚠️ Enables Structured Outputs (strict mode) for tool calls. ONLY enable for models that support this (e.g. GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini). Incompatible models will return errors!
help.logging.enable_file_log: Beskrivelse: Writes logs additionally to a file.
help.maintenance.enabled: Aktiverer the daily maintenance mode for self-updates.
help.maintenance.time: Beskrivelse: Time for the daily maintenance run (HH:MM format).
help.mcp.enabled: Aktiverer the MCP integration. Additionally requires 'MCP Server Connections' to be enabled in the Danger Zone.
help.mcp_server.allowed_tools: Liste over verktøynavn eksponert via MCP. La stå tom for å eksponere alle aktiverte verktøy.
help.mcp_server.enabled: Aktiver den innebygde MCP-serveren for å eksponere AuraGo-verktøy for eksterne AI-agenter via Streamable HTTP.
help.mcp_server.require_auth: Når dette er aktivert: MCP clients must authenticate with a Bearer token or valid session cookie.
help.meshcentral.blocked_operations: Beskrivelse: Explicit deny-list for MeshCentral operations (e.g. ["run_command","power_action","wake"]). This policy is enforced in addition to readonly.
help.meshcentral.enabled: Aktiverer the MeshCentral integration for remote device management.
help.meshcentral.login_token: Beskrivelse: Login token username (starts with ~t:), generated via MeshCentral → My Account → Login Tokens. Bypasses 2FA. The token password goes into the password field above.
help.meshcentral.password: Beskrivelse: Password for login. When using a login token: the token password generated by MeshCentral.
help.meshcentral.readonly: Skrivebeskyttet modus for MeshCentral. Tillater kun leseoperasjoner (vis grupper/enheter) og blokkerer endringer som oppvåkning, strømhandlinger eller kommandokjøring.
help.meshcentral.url: Beskrivelse: Root URL of the MeshCentral installation (e.g. https://mesh.example.com or https://host/meshcentral). If MeshCentral runs on a sub-path, include it. No trailing slash.
help.meshcentral.username: Beskrivelse: Regular username for MeshCentral login. Ignored when a login token is set.
help.mqtt.broker: MQTT-megleradresse i formatet 'tcp://host:port' (f.eks. 'tcp://localhost:1883') eller 'ssl://host:port' for TLS.
help.mqtt.buffer_max_messages: Maksimalt antall meldinger i bufferen. Eldste meldinger forkastes når grensen nås. Standard: 500.
help.mqtt.client_id: Klient ID for meglerforbindelsen. Standard: 'aurago'. Må være unik per megler.
help.mqtt.connect_timeout: Tidsavbrudd for tilkobling i sekunder. Standard: 15.
help.mqtt.enabled: Aktiverer MQTT-integrasjonen. Lar agenten publisere, motta og abonnere på MQTT-meldinger.
help.mqtt.password_help: Passord for MQTT-autentisering. Lagret sikkert i det krypterte hvelvet.
help.mqtt.qos: Standard servicekvalitetsnivå: 0 = maksimalt én gang, 1 = minst én gang, 2 = nøyaktig én gang.
help.mqtt.read_only: Når aktivert, kan agenten bare lese MQTT-meldinger men kan ikke publisere, abonnere eller avslutte abonnement.
help.mqtt.relay_to_agent: Når aktivert, videresendes innkommende MQTT-meldinger som kontekst til agenten.
help.mqtt.tls_ca_file: Sti til CA-sertifikatfilen for TLS-bekreftelse (valgfritt, for tilpassede CA-er).
help.mqtt.tls_cert_file: Sti til klientsertifikatfilen for gjensidig TLS-autentisering (valgfritt).
help.mqtt.tls_insecure_skip_verify: Hopp over TLS-sertifikatbekreftelse. ADVARSEL: Bruk kun for testing med selvsignerte sertifikater.
help.mqtt.tls_key_file: Sti til klientens private nøkkelfil for gjensidig TLS-autentisering (valgfritt).
help.mqtt.topics: Kommaseparert liste med emner å abonnere på ved oppstart (f.eks. 'home/#, sensors/temperature').
help.mqtt.username: Brukernavn for MQTT-autentisering (valgfritt, avhengig av meglerkonfigurasjon).
help.notifications.ntfy.topic: Beskrivelse: ntfy topic name for this AuraGo instance.
help.notifications.ntfy.url: Beskrivelse: ntfy server URL. Standard: 'https://ntfy.sh'. Can be self-hosted.
help.ollama.enabled: Aktiverer the Ollama integration for local LLM management.
help.ollama.managed_instance.container_p: Beskrivelse: Host port for the managed Ollama container (default: 11434). Must not conflict with other services.
help.ollama.managed_instance.default_mod: Modeller som lastes ned automatisk etter containerstart. Kommaseparert liste, f.eks. 'llama3,mistral'.
help.ollama.managed_instance.enabled: Oppretter og administrerer automatisk en lokal Ollama Docker-container. Krever at Docker er tilgjengelig.
help.ollama.managed_instance.gpu_backend: GPU-backend for den administrerte containeren. 'auto' oppdager automatisk NVIDIA, AMD, Intel eller Vulkan. Bruk 'vulkan' for eldre iGPUer/APUer uten ROCm-støtte.
help.ollama.managed_instance.memory_limi: Docker-minnegrense for containeren, f.eks. '8g' eller '512m'. La stå tom for ubegrenset.
help.ollama.managed_instance.use_host_gp: Sender vertens GPU-enheter til containeren for maskinvareakselerert inferens (kun Linux).
help.ollama.managed_instance.volume_path: Vertsbane for vedvarende modelllagring. La stå tom for å bruke et Docker-administrert volum.
help.ollama.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only list and show models but cannot pull, delete, load, or unload them.
help.paperless_ngx.api_token: API-token for Paperless-ngx-instansen. Lagres i hvelvet.
help.paperless_ngx.read_only: Når aktivert, kan agenten bare søke i og lese dokumenter, men kan ikke laste opp, oppdatere eller slette dem.
help.personality.core_personality: Aktivt personlighetsprofil, f.eks. neutral, punk, zen.
help.personality.emotion_synthesizer.ena: Aktiverer Emotion Synthesizer. Krever Personality Engine V2.
help.personality.emotion_synthesizer.min: Minimumsintervall i sekunder mellom syntese. Standard: 60.
help.personality.engine: Schakelt de personality engine in met stemming en micro-traits. Wordt automatisch ingeschakeld wanneer Personality Engine V2 actief is.
help.personality.engine_v2: Aktiverer den avanserte V2-motoren med asynkron LLM-stemningsanalyse.
help.personality.inner_voice.decay_turns: Antall samtalerunder før en indre stemme-tanker forsvinner fra prompten. Standard: 3.
help.personality.inner_voice.enabled: Aktiverer den Indre Stemmen / underbevisste nudge-motor. Genererer subtile atferdsnudge basert på agentens emosjonelle tilstand. Krever Emotion Synthesizer og Personality Engine V2.
help.personality.inner_voice.error_strea: Minimale påfølgende feil før feilserie-utløseren avfyrer en indre stemme-nudge. Standard: 2.
help.personality.inner_voice.max_per_ses: Maksimalt antall indre stemme-tanker per samtaleøkt. Standard: 20.
help.personality.inner_voice.min_interva: Minimale sekunder mellom genereringer av indre stemme. Forhindrer overdreven LLM-bruk. Standard: 60.
help.personality.user_profiling: Aktiverer automatisk brukerprofil fra samtalen (krever V2).
help.personality.user_profiling_threshol: Minimum: confidence (number of confirmations) before a profile attribute is injected into the system prompt. Standard: 2.
help.personality.v2_api_key: Valgfritt: custom API key for the V2 engine. Usually 'ollama' for Ollama.
help.personality.v2_provider: Beskrivelse: Legacy compatibility field. Helper-owned personality analysis now uses the central Helper LLM from the LLM settings.
help.personality.v2_timeout_secs: Tidsavbrudd i sekunder for det asynkrone V2 LLM-kallet. Standard: 30.
help.personality.v2_url: Valgfritt: custom base URL for V2, e.g. for a local Ollama ('http://localhost:11434/v1').
help.providers.account_id: Beskrivelse: Cloudflare Account ID for Workers AI providers. Required when using the workers-ai provider type.
help.proxmox.enabled: Aktiverer the Proxmox VE integration for virtualization management.
help.proxmox.insecure: Deaktiver TLS-sertifikatbekreftelse. Aktiver for selvsignerte sertifikater.
help.proxmox.node: Standard nodenavn, f.eks. 'pve'. Brukes når ingen node er angitt.
help.proxmox.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only list and inspect VMs/containers but cannot start, stop, or create snapshots.
help.proxmox.token_id: Beskrivelse: API token ID in the format 'user@pam!tokenname'.
help.proxmox.url: URL til Proxmox VE API, e.g. 'https://pve.example.com:8006'.
help.rocketchat.alias: Visningsnavn for boten i Rocket.Chat. Standard: 'AuraGo'.
help.rocketchat.user_id: Beskrivelse: Bot user ID from Rocket.Chat (Profile > Personal Access Tokens).
help.s3.access_key: Beskrivelse: Access Key ID for S3 authentication. Stored encrypted in the vault.
help.s3.bucket: Standard: bucket name. Can also be specified per API call.
help.s3.enabled: Aktiverer S3-kompatibel lagringsintegrasjon (AWS S3, MinIO, Wasabi, Backblaze B2).
help.s3.endpoint: Beskrivelse: S3 endpoint URL (e.g. https://s3.amazonaws.com or http://minio.local:9000). La stå tomt for AWS default.
help.s3.insecure: Tillat HTTP (ikke-TLS) endepunkter. Aktiver kun for lokale/utviklingsmiljøer.
help.s3.read_only: Når aktivert, kan agenten bare liste og laste ned objekter, men kan ikke laste opp, slette, kopiere eller flytte dem.
help.s3.region: AWS-region (f.eks. us-east-1). Påkrevd for AWS S3, valgfritt for MinIO.
help.s3.secret_key: Secret Access Key for S3-autentisering. Kryptert lagret i hvelvet.
help.s3.use_path_style: Aktiver sti-stil adressering (kreves for MinIO og de fleste S3-kompatible tjenester).
help.sandbox.auto_install: Installer automatisk llm-sandbox Python-pakken (med MCP-ekstra) ved oppstart. Installerer 'llm-sandbox[mcp-docker]' eller 'llm-sandbox[mcp-podman]' avhengig av backend. Krever et fungerende Python/pip-miljø.
help.sandbox.backend: Container-backend: 'docker' (standard) eller 'podman'. Docker må være installert og tilgjengelig.
help.sandbox.docker_host: Beskrivelse: Docker host address (e.g. 'unix:///var/run/docker.sock' or 'tcp://localhost:2375'). Empty = auto-detect or inherit from docker.host.
help.sandbox.enabled: Aktiverer isolated code execution in Docker containers. The agenten will use execute_sandbox as the default tool for writing and running code.
help.sandbox.image: Beskrivelse: Docker image for sandbox containers (default: 'python:3.11-slim').
help.sandbox.keep_alive: Holder sandbox-MCP-serveren kjørende mellom kall i stedet for å starte den på nytt hver gang.
help.sandbox.network_enabled: Beskrivelse: Allows sandbox containers to access the network. Disabled by default for maximum isolation.
help.sandbox.pool_size: Antall forvarmede containere i puljen (0 = ingen pulje). Høyere verdier gjør kjøring raskere, men bruker mer ressurser.
help.sandbox.timeout_seconds: Maksimum: execution time per sandbox call in sekunder (default: 30).
help.server.bridge_address: Beskrivelse: TCP address for the Lifeboat bridge connection (host:port). Standard: 'localhost:8089'.
help.server.host: Beskrivelse: IP address the server listens on. '127.0.0.1' = local only, '0.0.0.0' = all interfaces.
help.server.https.domain: Beskrivelse: Public domain name (e.g. aurago.mydomain.com). Both port 80 and 443 must be forwarded to AuraGo for Let's Encrypt to work.
help.server.https.email: Kontakte-post for Let's Encrypt. Brukes for advarsler om sertifikatutløp. Vises ikke offentlig.
help.server.https.enabled: Aktiverer HTTPS via Let's Encrypt. AuraGo will automatically obtain and renew a certificate for your domain. HTTP (port 80) from external sources is redirected to HTTPS. Localhost remains accessible via HTTP.
help.server.max_body_bytes: Maksimum: HTTP request body size in bytes (config endpoint). Standard: 10485760 (10 MB).
help.server.port: Beskrivelse: Port for the web server and REST API.
help.sqlite.invasion_path: Beskrivelse: Path to SQLite database for Invasion Control (Nests/Eggs). Standard: './data/invasion.db'.
help.sqlite.site_monitor_path: Sti til SQLite-database for Site Monitor (registrering av endringer på nettsider). Standard: './data/site_monitor.db'.
help.tailscale.api_key: Beskrivelse: Tailscale API key (starts with 'tskey-api-'). Create at https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys.
help.tailscale.enabled: Aktiverer the Tailscale integration for VPN network management.
help.tailscale.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only list devices and status but cannot enable or disable routes.
help.tailscale.tailnet: Beskrivelse: Tailnet name, e.g. 'example.com', or leave blank for the default tailnet ('-').
help.telegram.max_concurrent_workers: Maksimum: number of concurrently processed Telegram messages. Standard: 5.
help.telegram.telegram_user_id: Beskrivelse: Your Telegram user ID for authorization.
help.tools.ddg_search.summary_mode: Når aktivert, sendes DuckDuckGo-søkeresultater gjennom den sentrale hjelpe-LLM-en for fokusert oppsummering før de returneres til agenten. Reduserer token-forbruk og fremhever relevant informasjon.
help.tools.form_automation.enabled: Aktiverer skjemaautomatiseringsverktøyet (form_automation). Bruker en headless Chromium-nettleser til å fylle ut og sende inn nettskjemaer. Krever tools.web_capture.enabled: true.
help.tools.inventory.enabled: Schakelt apparaatinventarisatievragen in. Staat de agent toe om geregistreerde apparaten op te vragen.
help.tools.knowledge_graph.enabled: Aktiverer the knowledge graph tool. Allows the agenten to manage nodes and edges in the graph.
help.tools.knowledge_graph.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only search the graph but cannot add or delete nodes or edges.
help.tools.memory.enabled: Aktiverer core memory tools (manage_memory, query_memory). Allows the agenten to store and retrieve facts.
help.tools.memory.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only read memories but cannot add, update, or delete them.
help.tools.memory_maintenance.enabled: Aktiverer memory maintenance tools (archive_memory, optimize_memory). Allows the agenten to archive and optimize memories.
help.tools.missions.enabled: Aktiverer Mission Control (manage_missions). Allows the agenten to manage automation missions.
help.tools.missions.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only view missions but cannot create, update, delete, or run them.
help.tools.network_scan.enabled: Aktiverer mDNS-nettverksskannings-verktøyet (mdns_scan). Oppdager enheter på det lokale nettverket via Bonjour/ZeroConf.
help.tools.notes.enabled: Aktiverer notes/todo management (manage_notes). Allows the agenten to manage notes and tasks.
help.tools.notes.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only view notes but cannot create, update, or delete them.
help.tools.pdf_extractor.enabled: Aktiverer PDF-tekstuttrekkverktøyet. Når deaktivert, kan ikke agenten trekke ut tekstinnhold fra PDF-filer.
help.tools.pdf_extractor.summary_mode: Når aktivert, sendes uttrukket PDF-tekst gjennom den sentrale hjelpe-LLM-en for fokusert oppsummering før den returneres til agenten. Nyttig for store dokumenter.
help.tools.python_secret_injection.enabl: Beskrivelse: Allows Python tools (execute_python, execute_sandbox, execute_skill, run_tool) to request vault secrets via the vault_keys parameter. Secrets are injected as AURAGO_SECRET_<KEY> environment variables. Only user/agenten-created secrets are accessible — system and integration secrets are blocked. Disabled by default for security.
help.tools.python_tool_bridge.allowed_sq: Velg hvilke SQL-tilkoblingsnavn Python-skills kan bruke når de kaller sql_query via tool bridge. La stå tomt for å blokkere SQL-bridge-kall.
help.tools.python_tool_bridge.allowed_to: Velg hvilke native AuraGo-verktøy Python-skills kan kalle via tool-bridgen. Verktøyet må også være oppført i skill-manifestet (internal_tools). La stå tomt for å blokkere alle bridge-kall.
help.tools.python_tool_bridge.enabled: Tillater Python-skills å kalle native AuraGo-verktøy (f.eks. proxmox, docker_management) direkte via en intern HTTP-bridge. Skills må deklarere nødvendige verktøy i sitt manifest (internal_tools-feltet), og verktøynavnene må være hvitelistet i python_tool_bridge.allowed_tools. Deaktivert som standard av sikkerhetsgrunner.
help.tools.scheduler.enabled: Aktiverer the scheduler tool (cron_scheduler). Allows the agenten to schedule recurring tasks.
help.tools.scheduler.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only view scheduled jobs but cannot add or remove them.
help.tools.secrets_vault.enabled: Aktiverer the secrets vault tool. Allows the agenten to read and store encrypted secrets.
help.tools.secrets_vault.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only read secrets but cannot store or modify them.
help.tools.stop_process.enabled: Aktiverer the ability to stop processes. When disabled, the agenten can only list processes.
help.tools.upnp_scan.enabled: Aktiverer UPnP-skanneverktøyet (upnp_scan). Oppdager UPnP/SSDP-enheter på det lokale nettverket.
help.tools.web_scraper.enabled: Når dette er deaktivert: the web_scraper skill is blocked. The agenten will not be able to fetch external websites.
help.tools.web_scraper.summary_mode: Når dette er aktivert: scraped content is summarized through the central Helper LLM. This reduces tokens, batches helper work where possible, and hardens against prompt injection.
help.tools.web_scraper.summary_provider: Legacy-kompatibilitetsfelt. Nettsammendrag bruker nå den sentrale Helper LLM fra LLM-innstillingene.
help.tools.wikipedia.summary_mode: Når aktivert, sendes Wikipedia-artikler gjennom den sentrale hjelpe-LLM-en for fokusert oppsummering før de returneres til agenten. Reduserer token-forbruk og fremhever relevant informasjon.
help.tools.wol.enabled: Aktiverer the Wake-on-LAN tool. The agenten can send a magic packet to wake up devices that have a MAC address registered in the device manager. Requires devices to support WOL and be reachable on the local network.
help.tts.language: BCP-47 språkkode for Google TTS, f.eks. 'no' eller 'en'.
help.virustotal.api_key: API-nøkkel for VirusTotal tool. WARNING: DO NOT use this tool on files containing personal data or sensitive information. Files may be made available to security researchers and your submissions may be made public.
help.virustotal.enabled: Aktiver the VirusTotal integration. Allows scanning URLs, domains, IPs, and file hashes via the VirusTotal API.
help.vision.base_url: Beskrivelse: Base URL for the vision LLM.
help.vision.model: Beskrivelse: Model name for the vision LLM.
help.vision.provider: Velg a provider from the provider management for image analysis.
help.web_config.enabled: Aktiverer the web configuration page at /config. Disabled by default for security.
help.webdav.auth_type: Beskrivelse: Choose whether AuraGo should use Basic Auth with username and password, or a Bearer token.
help.webdav.password: Passord eller app-passord for Basic Auth. Lagres trygt i Vault.
help.webdav.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only read and list files but cannot write, delete, or move them.
help.webdav.token: Beskrivelse: Bearer token for servers that expect an Authorization: Bearer … header. Stored securely in the vault.
help.webhooks.enabled: Aktiverer the webhook system. Allows up to 10 incoming webhooks with token authentication.
help.webhooks.max_payload_size: Maksimum: payload size in bytes per webhook request. Standard: 65536 (64 KB).
help.webhooks.rate_limit: Maksimum: webhook requests per minute per token. 0 = unlimited.
help.webhooks.read_only: Når dette er aktivert: the agenten can only list webhooks and read logs but cannot create, update, or delete them.
help.whisper.mode: Whisper-modus: 'whisper' (standard OpenAI API), 'multimodal' (Gemini/multimodal LLM) eller 'local' (lokal server).
help.whisper.provider: Velg en leverandør fra leverandørstyringen for tale-til-tekst.
help.tools.knowledge_graph.auto_extracti: Trekker automatisk ut entiteter og relasjoner fra nylige samtaler til kunnskapsgrafen.
help.tools.knowledge_graph.prompt_inject: Legger relevant kunnskapsgraf-kontekst inn i systemprompten.
help.mqtt.buffer_max_age_hours: Maksimal alder for bufrede meldinger i timer. Eldre meldinger fjernes når nye meldinger kommer inn eller bufferen leses. Bruk 0 for å deaktivere aldersrydding.
help.mqtt.buffer_max_payload_bytes: Maksimal payload-størrelse per MQTT-melding. Større innkommende payloads forkortes før de når buffer, mission-triggere eller agent-relay.
help.mqtt.clean_session: Når aktivert beholder ikke broker en persistent økt for denne klienten. Deaktiver bare hvis broker skal køe QoS 1/2-meldinger mens AuraGo er offline.
help.mqtt.trigger_min_interval_seconds: Standard minimumsintervall i sekunder mellom MQTT-utløste mission-starter. Bruk 0 for å deaktivere grensen.
help.mqtt.availability_enabled: Publiserer online etter tilkobling og konfigurerer MQTT Last Will slik at andre systemer kan oppdage når AuraGo går offline.
help.mqtt.availability_payloads: Payloads for online og offline tilgjengelighetsmeldinger.
help.mqtt.availability_retain: Når aktivert beholder broker siste tilgjengelighetsstatus for nye abonnenter.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.max_total_tool: Maks endelig antall native verktøyskjemaer etter at påkrevde verktøy er beholdt.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.provider_profi: Bruker leverandørspesifikke stabilitetsprofiler for verktøygrenser og svartopp-timeouter.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.session_tool_r: Hvor mange nylige runder som holder brukte verktøy synlige som myke always-include verktøy.
